titleStmt.title: SII 26.513: original edition by P. R. Srinivasan
No. 513. (A.R. No. 486 of 1909.) ŚŌḺAPURAM, SIVAGANGA TALUK, RAMANATHAPURAM DISTRICT.

summary.p: It records a grant of land by the king to the temple of the god Vikramapāṇḍīśvaramuḍaiyār of Śōḻapuram in Āṉmā-nāḍu, to provide for a festival (name lost) instituted there after the name of the king, and for food and other offerings at the daily worship in the same temple. It is stated that the land, situated in Śakkaranēri in [•••••] pāṇḍya-chaturvvēdimaṅgalam •••• in Ārināḍu was brought as kaṟpūra-vilai for a sum of 1000 paṇam from a certain Sundarapāṇḍyavāṇakōvaraiyar, and was granted to the temple for use from the month of Vaikāśi in the 5th year in the reign of the king. It is also stated that the king ordered that from this year onward annually a sum of 100 poṉ from the income of the gift land might be deducted for this purpose.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . tribhuvanaccakravatti koṉeriṉmelkoṇṭāṉ Āṇmānāṭṭu coḻapurattu Uṭaiyār vikramapāṇṭīśvaramuṭaiyanāyaṉār koyil tānattāṟku nāyaṉāṟku namperāl kaṭṭiṉa vāḷāla mutiṟnta tirunāḷukkum Amutupaṭi cāttuppaṭi Uḷḷiṭṭa nittaṉimantaṅkaḷukkum mutalaṭaṅka Iṟaiyiliyāka Ārināṭṭu viṭṭa
pāṇṭiyacaturvvedimaṅkalattu cakkaranerikku kaṟppūravilaikku Āyiram paṇam cuntarapāṇṭiya vāṇakovaraiyar pakkalile vāṅkikkoṇṭu Añcāvatu vaikācimāta mutal kāṇiyāka kuṭuttom Iṉṉāṉkellaikkuṭpaṭṭa nilattil nañcai karuñcaiyum nattamum nattappāḻum toṭṭamum toṭṭakkollaikaḷum taṟiyiṟai cekkiṟai taṭṭoli taṭṭārpāṭṭam vari Āḷvari maṉai
vari Iṭaivāramum puñcaivācal viṉiyokamum Ilāñciṉaippeṟu Āṉaiccālai kutiraippanti nāṭṭuviṉiyokam kāttikaippoṉ kāttikaipaccai nattappaccai piḷḷaiyār nompittevai Āṇṭeḻuttutevai pañcupili cantivigraham Olaiyeḻuttu viṉiyokam Uṭpaṭṭa palavupātikaḷukkum Irācipācaṉa kuḷikaiyāka nūṟu poṉ taṅkaḷukku Icaiya col
li variyiluṅ kaḻikkac coṉṉom Ippaṭikku Ivvolai piṭipāṭākakoṇṭu candrādityavarai cellak kallilum cempilum veṭṭikkoṇṭu Innāḷ mutal kaṭamai Irācipācaṉa kuḷikaiyāka Āṇṭoṉṟukku nūṟupoṉṉum cilavaṟuppittu koṇṭu Ivvūr nāṉkellaikkuṭpaṭṭa nilamum nattamum ceytukoḷḷumpaṭi colliviṭuka Ivai
la maṅkalamuṭaiyāṉ Eḻuttu yāṇṭu rūpāy nāḷ 310 3 Ivai vi viraṉ Eḻuttu tulyam
Digital edition of SII 26.513 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
